title: Learning to drink mate from a stranger in Buenos Aires
summary: A short narrative about being taught a local ritual by someone you just met.
topic: Learning to drink mate from a stranger in Buenos Aires
prompt: Write 8–10 sentences (150–250 words) about a moment when a stranger taught you a small cultural custom while you were travelling. Use past simple, past continuous, and the connectors 'when' and 'before'.
hintStarters: On my third day in…, I was sitting alone on a bench when…
Before he gave it to me, he carefully…
I did not know that you must…
sampleText: On my third day in Buenos Aires, I was sitting alone on a bench in a quiet park near San Telmo when an older man sat down beside me. He had grey hair, a leather jacket, and a small metal thermos under his arm. After a minute, he opened a wooden cup full of green leaves and poured hot water into it. He looked at me and smiled. 'Mate?' he asked. I had heard the word, but I had never tried it. He showed me his metal straw and said, 'It is a little bitter. Just sip slowly and pass it back.' Before he gave it to me, he carefully wiped the straw with a paper napkin. The first sip was very strong, almost like dark tea, but I tried not to make a face. We drank from the same cup for almost an hour, while he told me about his daughter in Spain and his old job as a music teacher. I did not know that you must always say 'gracias' only when you do not want any more. When I said it too early, he laughed and refilled the cup anyway. I left the park with a warm stomach and a new word for friendship.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: I was sitting alone on a bench
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: Tôi đang ngồi một mình trên ghế dài

sampleAnnotations.phrase: a small metal thermos under his arm
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: một bình giữ nhiệt nhỏ bằng kim loại kẹp dưới cánh tay

sampleAnnotations.phrase: a wooden cup full of green leaves
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: một cái ly gỗ đầy lá xanh

sampleAnnotations.phrase: sip slowly and pass it back

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: lau ống hút một cách cẩn thận

sampleAnnotations.phrase: tried not to make a face
only when you do not want any more
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: chỉ khi bạn không muốn uống nữa

sampleAnnotations.phrase: he laughed and refilled the cup anyway
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: ông ấy cười và vẫn rót thêm vào ly
một từ mới chỉ tình bạn

sampleGrammarNotes.title: 'When' + past simple for a sudden event
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng past continuous cho bối cảnh đang diễn ra và 'when + past simple' cho hành động chen vào: 'I was sitting alone on a bench when an older man sat down beside me.'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use past continuous for the ongoing background and 'when + past simple' for the interrupting event: 'I was sitting alone on a bench when an older man sat down beside me.'

sampleGrammarNotes.title: 'Before' as a time clause
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'Before + clause' đặt sự việc xảy ra trước: 'Before he gave it to me, he carefully wiped the straw.' Hai mệnh đề đều ở past simple.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'Before + clause' marks the earlier event: 'Before he gave it to me, he carefully wiped the straw.' Both clauses stay in past simple.

sampleTranslationVi: Vào ngày thứ ba của tôi ở Buenos Aires, tôi đang ngồi một mình trên ghế dài trong một công viên yên tĩnh gần San Telmo thì một ông cụ ngồi xuống bên cạnh. Ông có mái tóc bạc, một chiếc áo khoác da, và một bình giữ nhiệt nhỏ bằng kim loại kẹp dưới cánh tay. Sau một phút, ông mở một cái ly gỗ đầy lá xanh và rót nước nóng vào. Ông nhìn tôi và mỉm cười. 'Mate?' ông hỏi. Tôi đã nghe từ này, nhưng chưa bao giờ thử. Ông chỉ cho tôi cái ống hút kim loại và nói, 'Nó hơi đắng một chút. Cứ nhấp chậm rồi đưa lại.' Trước khi đưa cho tôi, ông lau ống hút một cách cẩn thận bằng khăn giấy. Ngụm đầu tiên rất đậm, gần như trà đen, nhưng tôi cố gắng không nhăn mặt. Chúng tôi uống từ cùng một cái ly trong gần một giờ, trong khi ông kể về con gái ông ở Tây Ban Nha và công việc cũ làm giáo viên âm nhạc. Tôi không biết rằng bạn chỉ nên nói 'gracias' khi bạn không muốn uống nữa. Khi tôi nói nó quá sớm, ông cười và vẫn rót thêm vào ly. Tôi rời công viên với cái bụng ấm và một từ mới chỉ tình bạn.

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct combination: past continuous + 'when' + past simple.
options: I sat alone on a bench when an older man was sitting beside me.
I was sitting alone on a bench when an older man sat down beside me.
I was sit alone on a bench when an older man was sit beside me.
I am sitting alone on a bench when an older man sat down beside me.
mcQuestions.explanation: Background ongoing → past continuous; interrupting event → past simple.
mcQuestions.hint: Was + -ing for background; past simple for the sudden event.

options: Before he gives it to me, he carefully wiped the straw.
Before he gave it to me, he carefully wiped the straw.
Before he was giving it to me, he carefully wipes the straw.
Before he gave it to me, he carefully wipes the straw.
mcQuestions.explanation: Both clauses are past simple in a past story.

options: to drink a small amount slowly
to drink a large amount quickly
to spill a drink
to refuse a drink
having a sharp, slightly unpleasant taste like dark coffee
very sweet and sugary
completely without flavour
tasting like fruit
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Bitter' is the sharp taste of dark coffee or strong tea.

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the natural meaning of 'tried not to make a face'.
options: tried not to take a photo
tried not to show a reaction of dislike on my face
tried not to smile
tried not to look at him
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Make a face' = pull a facial expression, often of disgust.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence shows correct use of 'must' for a rule?
options: You must always to say gracias when you finish.
You always must say gracias when you finish.
You must always say gracias when you finish.
You must always says gracias when you finish.
mcQuestions.explanation: Modal 'must' + base verb, with adverb 'always' between subject and main verb.

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct preposition: 'we drank ___ the same cup.'
options: from
with
by
in
mcQuestions.explanation: We drink 'from' a cup, not 'with' or 'by'.

options: a container that keeps drinks hot or cold
a small spoon
a paper bag for sandwiches
a cooking pan
mcQuestions.explanation: A 'thermos' is an insulated bottle for keeping drinks at temperature.

mcQuestions.prompt: Pick the correct sentence with a contrasting connector.
options: I had heard the word, but I had never tried it.
I had heard the word, and I had never tried it.
I had heard the word, so I had never tried it.
I had heard the word, because I had never tried it.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'But' shows the contrast between knowing the word and never tasting it.

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the best meaning of 'refilled the cup'.
options: filled the cup again
broke the cup
cleaned the cup
took the cup away

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct past simple sentence.
options: He tell me about his daughter in Spain.
He told me about his daughter in Spain.
He was tell me about his daughter in Spain.
He has told me about his daughter in Spain.
mcQuestions.explanation: Past simple 'told' fits a completed past action.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do you think small shared rituals (like sharing tea, coffee, or food) often build friendship faster than long conversations?
